raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A pink cup is in a white sink. The cup is made of plastic with a cylindrical body and a flat base. The sink has a drain. STRATEGY - First, grasp the cup by its body to lift it. Then, rotate the cup 180 degrees around its vertical axis to flip it upright. Finally, place the cup back into the sink. Failure modes include dropping the cup during rotation or placing it in an unstable position. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the cup body for a stable grasp; Step 2 grasp the cup body to lift it; Step 3 rotate the cup 180 degrees around its vertical axis; Step 4 place the cup back into the sink.
Goal: on(pink_cup, sink); stable(pink_cup)
Scene: pink_cup, sink
Step 1: reach(pink_cup)
  affordance_region: the body of the pink cup
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, pink_cup, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, pink_cup) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(pink_cup)
  affordance_region: the body of the pink cup
  contact: holding(pink_cup) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(pink_cup)
Step 3: rotate(pink_cup, 180)
  affordance_region: the body of the pink cup
  contact: holding(pink_cup) [progress]
  direction: rotate_axis(0, 1, 0, 180) [progress]
  done_when: orientation(pink_cup, upright)
Step 4: place(pink_cup -> sink)
  affordance_region: an empty area in the sink
  contact: surface_contact(pink_cup, sink) [completion]; released(pink_cup) [completion]
  pose: stable(pink_cup) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(pink_cup, sink) AND released(pink_cup)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the pink cup
the body of the pink cup
the body of the pink cup
an empty area in the sink
